prose:
Frontier-orbitals calculation on ethylene (C₂H₄) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI on by default) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file as-is (single-point; not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

LUMO (index 8): −0.17986527 eV
Total energy: −78.623486 Hartree (−2139.4541 eV)
